examples: For reversal learning, the mean correct number of rats in apomorphine group was significantly lower than its in saline group.
MethodsA home pigeon CuSO 4-vomiting model and dog -apomorphine vomiting model were used to observe the latent period of vomiting and the frequency of vomiting.
Results of apomorphine-induced rotation behavior experimentrSingle stimulation at different intensity could not decrease the rotation behavior in Parkinson rats;
The results in one small early trial of apomorphine were inconclusive, but Nastech is looking for a partner to help fund further research.
Apomorphine has been in existence for some time and was originally injected into patients with Parkinson's Disease - a condition which affects coordination.
